title: LOG IN
overview: In the immersive online game Planet, Ichi is a member of the formidable Akabane Family; but offline, his real life family is a dysfunctional mess.

title: ERROR
overview: After receiving a Declaration of War from the Pirates, Shiro and his sons go into enemy territory to discuss the matter with the Pirate Captain herself.

title: INSTALL
overview: There's something strange about the monster the Akabanes are fighting against. Sensing danger, Shiro orders the family to log out immediately.

title: UPGRADE
overview: Pico makes an unexpected decision before breaking through the barrier and confronting Ichi. Then, a mysterious person pays Asuma a visit.

title: VIRUS
overview: With players everywhere reeling, Shigatera reveals his true feelings and intentions. Then, Pico returns and demands an explanation.

title: REMOVE
overview: Pico has been logging into Planet to escape her oppressively controlling mother. But then, Shiro tells her something that rocks her very foundation.

title: BAN
overview: The Black Bird begins appearing in Shigatera's real life world. Taichiro and his mother visit Asuma in the hospital — and are shocked by what they find.

title: RELOAD
overview: Taichiro and Asuma reveal some long-held secrets to each other. The mysterious woman appears again and warns Asuma not to log back into Planet.

title: AR
overview: Hana tells Taichiro and Asuma about their father's involvement in Planet, Black Bird and more. Then, Taichiro tells Hana about his younger sister.

title: REGISTRY
overview: The whole family has been infected and are now back in Planet, but this dark world is nothing like the sunny paradise they once escaped into.

title: DEBUG
overview: Kojiro wants to see his family before they leave for a distant shelter, but Asuma tells him to stay away. Then, Sasumata asks Shiro a striking question.

title: Hello, World
overview: As Ichi, Taichiro attacks a heartbroken and furious Leon. Meanwhile, Shiro tells Sasumata that he created them under a different name.
